disclaimer.title: 📸 Before You Try On
disclaimer.body:
Our AI virtual try-on generates illustrative images to help you visualize the overall style of each outfit.

Because AI processes images algorithmically, results may not perfectly reflect your actual body proportions — especially for unique body types.

👗 For the best fit, please refer to our size chart and measure your body (bust, waist, hips) before placing a rental order.

sizeGuide.title: Size Guide
sizeGuide.subtitle: Measure accurately to choose the right size. We offer free size exchange if it doesn't fit.

importantNotes.title: Important Notes
items: Measure on body, not over thick clothing
Use soft measuring tape, not rigid ruler
Measure in the morning when body is not swollen
Ask someone to help for more accurate measurements

bust.title: Bust
bust.description: Measure around the fullest part of chest, tape parallel to floor
bust.tip: Wear everyday bra, don't inhale deeply or exhale completely

waist.title: Waist
waist.description: Measure around the smallest part of waist, usually 2-3cm above navel
waist.tip: Stand naturally straight, don't pull tape too tight

hip.title: Hip
hip.description: Measure around the fullest part of hips and buttocks
hip.tip: Stand with feet together, tape parallel to floor

shoulder.title: Shoulder
shoulder.description: Measure from one shoulder point to the other, across the back
shoulder.tip: Need someone else to help measure for accuracy

recommendations.title: Size Recommendations
items: If measurements fall between 2 sizes, choose the larger size
For fitted dresses, choose snug fit
For blazers, you can choose 1 size larger
Contact for consultation if unsure about size

cta.title: Still unsure about size?
cta.subtitle: Don't worry! We offer free size consultation and exchange within first 2 hours

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our fashion rental service. Can't find an answer? Contact us directly.

whatIsAiCloset.question: What is AI Closet?
whatIsAiCloset.answer: AI Closet is a premium fashion rental service for modern women. We provide beautiful designer outfits that you can rent for special occasions without expensive purchases.

rentalDuration.question: How long can I rent outfits?
rentalDuration.answer: Flexible rental period from 1-7 days depending on your needs. We have short-term packages for events and long-term for special occasions.

howToRent.question: How do I rent an outfit?
howToRent.answer: You can browse our collection on the website, choose your favorite outfit, select rental period and pay deposit. We will contact to confirm and deliver to your door.

deposit.question: How much deposit do I need to pay?
deposit.answer: Deposit is usually 30-50% of order value, depending on garment type and rental period. Remaining amount is paid upon delivery.

sizeSelection.question: How do I choose the right size?
sizeSelection.answer: You can refer to our detailed size chart on the website or contact us for consultation. We also offer free size exchange within first 2 hours if it doesn't fit.

cleanliness.question: Are the outfits clean and safe?
cleanliness.answer: All outfits are professionally cleaned and safely sanitized after each rental. We guarantee hygiene quality and safety for customers.

damage.question: What if the outfit gets damaged?
damage.answer: For minor damage from normal use, you don't need to worry. For major damage, we will charge repair or compensation fees according to regulations.

tryBefore.question: Can I try the outfit before renting?
tryBefore.answer: Currently we don't offer try-before service, but you can check carefully upon delivery and return within first 2 hours if not suitable.

deliveryArea.question: Which areas do you deliver to?
deliveryArea.answer: We deliver within Da Nang area. Free shipping for distances under 5km, 30,000đ for distances over 5km. Free shipping for orders over 400,000đ.

deliveryTime.question: How long is delivery time?
deliveryTime.answer: Delivery time within Da Nang area is 2-4 hours. Shipper will contact 15-30 minutes before to notify specific delivery time.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: You can pay by cash on delivery or bank transfer. We accept common payment methods.

notHome.question: What if I'm not home during delivery?
notHome.answer: Shipper will call before arriving. If you're not home, we can reschedule delivery time or deliver to family members.

returnCases.question: In what cases can I return?
returnCases.answer: You can return in these cases: wrong size (first 2h, free), defective item (24h, free), not suitable (first 2h, 50% shipping fee), change of mind (first 1h, 100% shipping fee).

returnProcess.question: What is the return process?
returnProcess.answer: Contact Facebook, we confirm return reason, then shipper will collect the item and refund within 24-48 hours.

lateFee.question: Will I be charged if I return late?
lateFee.answer: Yes, late returns will incur daily penalty fees. Fee depends on garment type and delay time. Please contact early if you need extension.

insurance.question: What is the garment insurance policy?
insurance.answer: We have insurance for premium garments. Customers only bear responsibility up to maximum regulated amount, no worry about major risks.

promotions.question: Are there any promotion programs?
promotions.answer: We regularly have promotions for new customers, VIP customers and holiday seasons. Follow Facebook for latest promotion updates.

vipMembership.question: How do I become a VIP customer?
vipMembership.answer: Frequent customers or those with high total rental value will be upgraded to VIP with special benefits like discounts and priority booking.

referral.question: Can I refer friends?
referral.answer: Yes! We have an attractive referral program with benefits for both referrer and referee. Contact for more details.

styleConsultation.question: Do you offer style consultation service?
styleConsultation.answer: Yes, we provide free style consultation via Facebook or video call to help you choose the most suitable outfits for occasions and preferences.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.subtitle: Our consultation team is always ready to support you 24/7

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: AI Closet is committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our fashion rental service.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content:
We collect information you provide when registering, placing a rental order, or contacting support, including: full name, email address, phone number, delivery address, and body measurements (if you use the style advisor feature).

We also automatically collect certain technical data such as IP address, browser type, and browsing history to improve your experience.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content:
Your information is used to:
• Process rental orders and deliveries
• Send order confirmations and status updates
• Provide style advice and personalized product recommendations
• Offer customer support via Facebook and other channels
• Improve service quality and user experience

sections.title: Sharing Your Information
sections.content: AI Closet does not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We only share data with delivery partners to fulfill orders, and only to the minimum extent necessary.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We apply appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure. Account passwords are encrypted and never stored in plain text.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content:
You have the right to:
• Access and view your stored personal information
• Request correction of inaccurate information
• Request deletion of your account and associated data
• Opt out of marketing emails at any time

To exercise these rights, please contact us via Facebook.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies to maintain your login session and remember your preferences. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, though some website features may be affected.

sections.title: Policy Changes
sections.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any significant changes will be communicated via email or a notice on the website. Continued use of the service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

privacy.contact: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us via our Facebook page: AI Closet.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using AI Closet's services, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read carefully before placing a rental order.

sections.title: Fashion Rental Service
sections.content: AI Closet provides premium fashion rental services in Da Nang. All items in our inventory are quality-checked and professionally cleaned before each rental. We reserve the right to decline a rental order if the item is no longer available.

sections.title: Booking and Payment
sections.content:
A rental order is confirmed once you complete payment of the rental fee and deposit. The deposit ranges from 30–50% of the item's value and will be fully refunded upon return in good condition.

We accept cash on delivery (COD) and bank transfer.

sections.title: Rental Period and Extension
sections.content: The minimum rental period is 1 day. You may extend your rental before it expires through your account or by contacting us directly. Extension fees are calculated per additional day.

sections.title: Delivery and Pickup
sections.content: We deliver within Da Nang city within 2–4 hours. You may also pick up directly at our store. Upon receiving your order, please inspect the item before signing. Any complaints about item condition must be reported within 2 hours of receipt.

sections.title: Customer Responsibilities
sections.content: You are responsible for taking care of the garment during the rental period. Washing, altering, or modifying the item is not permitted. In the event of damage, loss, or late return, additional fees will be charged based on the extent of the damage.

sections.title: Damage and Compensation
sections.content: Normal wear from regular use is accepted at no charge. Damage caused by misuse (tears, heavy staining, missing accessories) will incur a compensation fee proportional to the damage, up to the full value of the item.

sections.title: Cancellation and Refunds
sections.content: You may cancel a rental order before delivery for a full refund. After receiving the item, cancellation is not possible, but size exchanges are allowed within the first 2 hours if a replacement is available.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: AI Closet is not liable for indirect damages arising from the use of our services. Our maximum liability in any case shall not exceed the value of your rental order.

terms.contact: If you have questions about these terms of service, please contact us via our Facebook page: AI Closet.

hero.title: Smart Fashion for the Modern Woman
hero.subtitle: AI Closet was born from a simple idea: every woman deserves to dress beautifully without overspending. We combine AI technology with a curated wardrobe to deliver a smart, convenient, and inspiring rental experience.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: AI Closet was built in Da Nang by young people passionate about fashion and technology. We noticed that many women want to look their best for special occasions — weddings, events, dates — but don't want to spend millions on an outfit worn just once.
story.p2: So AI Closet was born: a premium fashion rental platform with an AI virtual try-on feature that lets you visualize outfits on your own body before committing. No more wrong sizes, no more regrets after trying something on.
story.p3: We believe fashion should be a joy, not a financial burden. Every piece in the AI Closet wardrobe is carefully inspected, professionally cleaned, and ready for you to shine.
